---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue with documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## Documentation Issue Type
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Unclear/confusing explanation
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Missing example
- [ ] Other

## Location
<!-- Where is the documentation issue? -->

**Document/Page:**
<!-- Example: Quick Start Guide, Deploy Azure Guide, Admin User Guide -->

**Section:**
<!-- Example: "Step 3: Create Database" -->

**URL (if applicable):**
<!-- Link to the documentation -->

## Issue Description
<!-- Describe the problem with the documentation -->

## Expected Documentation
<!-- What should the documentation say or include? -->

## Suggested Fix
<!-- If you have a suggestion for how to fix it -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any additional information that might help -->

## Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots showing the issue -->

## Willing to Contribute
- [ ] I can submit a PR to fix this
- [ ] I need help from maintainers
